final:
module lfsr (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [4:0] lfsr_out
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            lfsr_out <= 5'b00001; // Initial state
        end else begin
            lfsr_out <= {lfsr_out[3:0], lfsr_out[4] ^ lfsr_out[3]}; // Feedback polynomial x^5 + x^4 + 1
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
